perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a POV shot of a hand holding a steaming white hot towel over a floral-patterned blanket in an airplane cabin. (2) The camera moves to reveal a young woman with long hair looking at the towel with a puzzled expression. (3) She then begins to wipe her face and forehead with the towel while maintaining a look of slight confusion and awkwardness, looking directly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A whimsical, fast-paced orchestral piece with strings and woodwinds begins immediately. (2) A low, continuous ambient hum of an airplane cabin is audible in the background. (3) No vocals are detected throughout the clip; the music remains the dominant audio element.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional/Hook text: "POV 第一次坐商務艙 為什麼給我熱毛巾？ What's the hot towel in business class really for?" (Curious and questioning tone). (2) Decorative text: "（不懂）" (Emotional state: confused).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with object -> Reveal character reaction -> Character action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character appearing on screen and holding the towel.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight brown hair wearing a white floral-print dress or top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern airplane business class pod with a purple-hued side panel, a monitor, and a literature pocket filled with magazines.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously capture the 'newbie' experience of flying business class for the first time, specifically poking fun at the user's uncertainty about how to properly use the provided hot towel.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: POV text overlay with dual-language subtitles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'relatable' trope of being out of place in a luxury setting, using fast-paced BGM to enhance the comedic timing of the character's awkward movements.
